mapper.sql: id, role_code, role_name, data_scope, sort, status, description, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_role_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0

SELECT FROM sys_role_info WHERE delete_flag = 0
AND role_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleCode}, '%')
AND role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role_info SET role_code = #{roleCode}, role_name = #{roleName}, data_scope = #{dataScope}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu_info WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_role_menu_info (id, role_id, menu_id, create_by, create_org, create_time) VALUES
(#{ids[idx]}, #{roleId}, #{menuId}, #{createBy}, #{createOrg}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT org_id FROM sys_role_data_scope_info WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_role_data_scope_info (id, role_id, org_id, create_by, create_org, create_time) VALUES
(#{ids[idx]}, #{roleId}, #{orgId}, #{createBy}, #{createOrg}, #{createTime})
